title: periloba longifolia
intro: Periloba longifolia, also known as Long-leafed Periloba, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial activities. The health benefits of Periloba longifolia include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of Periloba longifolia can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
